calculation_notes: Baselines are hand-derived from ALGORITHMS.md; no generated tooling was used.

Leaf count (Algorithm 1): demand = server_count(4) x ports_per_connection across the two server connections = 4 servers x 2 ports = 8 logical ports into the leaf-server zone (port_range 1-48, no breakout, capacity 48, uplink_reservation 0). ceil(8 / 48) = 1, raised to 2 by the 'alternating distribution => leaf_count >= 2' constraint. override_quantity: 2 in plan.yaml matches this derivation.

Spine count (Algorithm 2): total_leaf_uplink_demand = leaf_count(2) x uplinks_per_leaf(8, from leaf-uplink zone 49-56) = 16. spine_fabric_port_capacity = 32 (spine-fabric zone 1-32). ceil(16 / 32) = 1. override_quantity: 1 in plan.yaml matches this derivation.
Server-to-leaf cables: each of 4 servers has 2 unbundled single-port data connections = 8 cables.
Leaf-to-spine cables: total leaf uplink ports = leaf_count(2) x uplinks_per_leaf(8) = 16 cables, all landing on the single spine (16 <= 32 spine ports).

BOM (Algorithm 6, recursive DeviceClass traversal): gpu-server per unit = chassis x1, h100-gpu x8, connectx-7-nic x2, and osfp-400g-xcvr x2 (2 NICs x 1 transceiver each, recursed). Fleet = per_unit x plan_quantity(4). leaf-switch and spine-switch have no sub_components, so each contributes only itself (fleet = plan_quantity).
